prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-ELECTRICKEYBOARD-PARENT Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Pretend Play Electronic Keyboard Organ Musical Instrument Kids Toy (3 Colors) Description: The Musical Star Electronic Keyboard Set is a excellent and educational kids toy that promotes developmental learning skills which makes this item a great addition to any toy collection. The keyboard feature buttons that make animal sounds, a record button, musical instrument sounds, flashing lights and rhythms.

Each instrument is constructed of durable plastic and is safe for all kids at least 3 years old. The keyboard even has a top carry handle for easy transportation.

This rockin' set is a wonderful gift idea for young children. Search Terms: Toys for girls music electric piano fine motor skills birthday present active kids toys preschool learning activities sister Hanukkah Christmas gifts stocking stuffers playroom musical instruments recorder instrument for kids songs parenting pretend Features: - 24 Musical Keys - 8 Musical Instrument Buttons - Durable Plastic | Safe for Kids At Least 3 Years Old - Animal Noise Buttons - Top Carry Handle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Electronic Keyboard Musical Instrument Toy

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products Electronic Keyboard Organ Kids Musical Instrument Toy

tokens.name: Electronic Keyboard Organ Kids Musical Instrument Toy

anthropic.title_differentiation: 24 Keys, 8 Instrument Buttons, Animal Sounds, Flashing Lights, Carry Handle, Ages 3 Plus

openai.title_differentiation: 24 Musical Keys, 8 Instrument Buttons, Animal Sound Buttons, Flashing Lights, Durable Plastic, Carry Handle, Ages 3 And Up
